dashboard.title: Operations Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track workforce size, attendance quality, workflow backlog, contract risk, and payroll coverage in one view.
dashboard.contractDescription: Monitor employment contracts that need renewal or handover planning.
dashboard.departmentDistributionDescription: Active headcount by department for quick organization review.
dashboard.recentApprovalsDescription: Latest submitted and processed approval requests.

employee.title: People Records
employee.subtitle: Manage employee profiles, organization assignment, employment type, contracts, and workforce status.
employee.filterDescription: Search by name, employee number, email, phone, department, status, and employment type.
employee.searchPlaceholder: Search name, employee number, email, or phone
employee.tableDescription: Review core profile fields while retaining inactive employee history.
employee.formDescription: Maintain profile, organization, contract, and emergency contact information.
employee.empty: No employee records match the current filters.

department.title: Organization
department.subtitle: Maintain departments, owners, headcount plans, and positions so organization data stays aligned.
department.deleteProtected: This department still has employees or positions and cannot be deleted.
department.tableDescription: Department cards show owner, actual headcount, planned headcount, and staffing ratio.
department.formDescription: Maintain department name, responsibility, owner, and staffing plan.
department.positionDescription: Maintain position title, level, description, staffing plan, and filled headcount by department.
department.positionFormDescription: Maintain department, level, responsibility, and staffing plan for a position.
department.positionEmpty: No positions are available for the selected department.
department.positionDeleteProtected: This position still has employees and cannot be deleted.

attendance.title: Attendance Ledger
attendance.subtitle: Maintain monthly attendance, late arrival, absence, and leave records with traceable daily entries.
attendance.filterDescription: Filter records by month, employee, and attendance status.
attendance.tableDescription: Maintain daily attendance status with compact time display.
attendance.formDescription: Create or correct an employee's daily attendance record.
attendance.empty: No attendance records match the current filters.

salary.title: Payroll Management
salary.subtitle: Maintain employee payroll profiles and calculate gross pay, contributions, tax, and net pay.
salary.configDescription: Load an employee payroll profile, adjust it, and save it for future payroll runs.
salary.previewDescription: Review payslip and deduction composition before saving.
salary.breakdownDescription: Shows gross pay, deductions, taxable income, and net pay.
salary.empty: Select an employee and enter payroll parameters to calculate results.

approval.title: Workflow Center
approval.subtitle: Process leave, salary adjustment, and other requests with links to attendance and payroll data.
approval.queueDescription: Review workflows by applicant, role, and status with complete approval records.
approval.flowDescription: Tracks submission, approval, rejection, and processing time at each node.
approval.formDescription: Choose a real employee to start a workflow; approvers are resolved from organization data.
approval.empty: No workflow records are available in the current queue.
